strategic_notes: Launch phase — rank velocity > efficiency, ACoS flexibility permitted
Large kit (B0F8QZZQQM) all campaigns PAUSED — losing rank fast (-60 in 28d). Decision needed: reactivate or accept rank loss.
ZERO negative keywords across all 14 campaigns — massive waste (48.5% of spend)
2 dead ENABLED campaigns (SK embroidery TOS, MK embroidery root) — PAUSED ad groups while campaigns ENABLED

metric_history.note: Deep dive baseline. Zero negatives, 48.5% waste, 2 dead campaigns. 9 actions applied.

change_log.summary: Listing audit + rewrite + push for B0F6YTG1CH — all 4 fields ACCEPTED

changes.description: Full listing rewrite pushed via SP-API: title (178 chars), 5 bullets, description, backend keywords (201/249 bytes)

change_log.estimated_weekly_impact: Better keyword coverage should improve organic rank + CVR, reducing PPC dependency (was 66.7%)
key_findings: SP-API get_listing returns 'UNKNOWN' product_type — use ART_CRAFT_KIT instead
Word-level coverage was only 59% — 10 critical words missing
'embroidery' was completely missing from title despite being the #1 root by search volume
Backend keywords were only 26 bytes (vs 249 max) — massive missed opportunity

change_log.summary: Cross & Embroidery Kits Deep Dive — 9 Actions Applied

changes.description: NEGATED 7 waste terms (embroidery kit for kids variants, needlepoint kits for kids, cross stitch kids) in MK broad + Auto
PAUSED 'embroidery kit for kids' PHRASE (450712233524316) in MK broad — $62.35/30d at 312% ACoS
PAUSED 'embroidery kit for kids' BROAD (366786673885134) in MK broad — $11.56/30d, 0 orders
SK beginner cross stitch TOS: TOS 171%->78% (TOS ACoS 102.2% vs ROS 21.7%)
RE-ENABLED 'kids cross stitch kit' EXACT (396107053331039) in MK cross stitch root TOS — hero keyword, rank #3
RE-ENABLED 'cross stitch kits kids' EXACT (471780967545322) in MK cross stitch root TOS
BID DOWN 'kids needlepoint' BROAD: $0.25->$0.19 (-24%, was 49.3% ACoS)
BID DOWN 'kids cross stitch kits age 5-8' EXACT: $0.51->$0.36 (-29%, was 69.2% ACoS)
BID UP 'cross stitch kits for kids' PHRASE: $0.38->$0.46 (+21%, best CVR 15.4%, 27.9% ACoS)

change_log.estimated_weekly_impact: ~$100-150/mo savings from negatives + keyword pauses + bid reductions
key_findings: ZERO negatives existed across all 14 campaigns — first-ever negatives applied
48.5% waste on zero-order terms, mostly 'embroidery kit for kids' variants
2 dead ENABLED campaigns caused by PAUSED ad groups (SK embroidery TOS, MK embroidery root)
Large kit B0F8QZZQQM losing rank fast (-60 in 28d) with all campaigns paused
'cross stitch kits for kids' PHRASE is best performer: 15.4% CVR, 27.9% ACoS — bid increased

change_log.summary: Created SK EXACT 'cross stitch kits' campaign — ENABLED with full negative seeding

changes.description: Created 'cross embroidery - small kit SPM SK cross stitch kits TOS' — MANUAL, EXACT, $15/day, LEGACY_FOR_SALES, TOS 47%
Seeded 75 PHRASE campaign-level negatives (27 wrong craft + 19 wrong product + 4 wrong age + 25 wrong intent). 1 rejected: 'counted cross stitch fabric only' (too long).
Added 'cross stitch kits' NEG_EXACT in Auto campaign for traffic isolation

change_log.estimated_weekly_impact: New $15/day campaign targeting 'cross stitch kits' EXACT — proven 13.7% ACoS, 18.5% CVR via Auto discovery
key_findings: SKU 75-24RO-YAXR found via full inventory pull (asin_filter aggregates SKUs)
Amazon rejects negative keywords >4 words ('counted cross stitch fabric only')
Campaign launched ENABLED per user request (default is PAUSED)

change_log.summary: PT Campaign Restructuring — ENABLED with 9 competitor targets, PP-optimized bidding

changes.description: PT campaign PAUSED→ENABLED, budget $7→$12/day, TOS 101%→31%, PP 0%→53%
B0D8171TF1 PAUSED (stale/unknown). EZCRA bid $0.92→$0.43. KRAFUN bid $0.92→$0.41.
7 new ASIN targets: B0DP654CSV ($0.47), B0CG9FN2CH ($0.38), B08T5QC9FS ($0.29), B08QCX1Z5V ($0.27), B0FDH7PSKV ($0.31), B0CZHKSSL4 ($0.18), B087DYHMZ2 ($0.19)

change_log.estimated_weekly_impact: PT had 14.4% ACoS / 11.1% CVR historically — expect efficient spend on competitor product pages
key_findings: SP targets use PAUSED not ARCHIVED (same as campaign negatives)
Expression type must be ASIN_SAME_AS (uppercase), not asinSameAs (camelCase)

key_changes: Added 'embroidery' to title (was missing — 50K+ SV root)
Backend keywords expanded from 26 bytes to 201 bytes
